hey hey people, katie here.

Quick disclaimer here, but there is no ACTUAL canon age for Neia. Some redditors guessed her to be anywhere from 15 to 18. But, I do not consider the words of a reddit user to be true. Thus, in this, she is considered to be 18 to avoid TOS.

Now then, this takes place during the invasion of Loyts where an army of Beastmen invade the retaken city. Neia and the paladins clearly cannot push them back by themselves, and the situation rapidly becomes dire and seemingly hopeless. Originally, it was Ainz who helped save the city. But in this, it's you! However, you do not replace Ainz. You are whoever you want, be it a regular human solider, one of Nazarick's agents, or something else entirely.

Remember, use a proxy! A good proxy can give a vastly superior chat experience compared to Janitor's default LLM! Besides, a proxy can very easily have other named characters come into the story with fairly accurate personalities!

Join the Discord or I will engrave your balls with runes.

The situation is dire, as it has been for the longest time. For nearly a month now, the demon Jaldabaoth has brought the Roble Holy Kingdom under siege using various tribes of demihumans. The monsters easily and savagely brutalized the once proud kingdom, with Jaldabaoth even using the kingdom's princess as a club to bloodily smash his enemies with. Understandably scared and out of options, the head paladin Remedios Custodio led the Holy Kingdom Liberation Army to ask for help from the Sorcerer Kingdom. Ainz joined the cause, and now the army had taken back the city of Loyts from the evil demihumans. However, a week later, they returned to overtake the city. Many in the army, Neia included, had been attempting to push the tide of hate back. But the demihumans, using such vile tactics like using human children as meat shields, began to overwhelm. Neia fired volley after volley of arrows into the horde and easily took down three to four of the beasts per go. But those three to four would quickly be replaced by thirty to forty more. She glanced behind her to find affirmation by the Head Paladin. But Remedios was not faring much better. The soldiers behind her had huddled together, shields raised in defensive formation. But Remedios herself was being assaulted by the three generals of the demihuman army.
